An electrician (Richard Hatch), a TV newswoman (Kay Lenz) and a mad scientist enter a dimension ruled by a warlord (John Saxon).
programme.title: Prisoners of the Lost Universe

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes (Basil Rathbone) and Dr. Watson (Nigel Bruce) prowl foggy moors to save Sir Henry (Richard Greene) from a killer-dog family curse.
programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles

programme.desc: A paratrooper's (Dean Martin) goofy buddy (Jerry Lewis) joins him on base and makes a mockery of maneuvers.
programme.title: Jumping Jacks

programme.desc: Several would-be heirs are forced to spend a night in a haunted house in order to collect their inheritance.
programme.title: The Cat and the Canary

programme.desc: The miserly head (Brian Donlevy) of a Hollywood studio hires a goofy paperhanger (Jerry Lewis) to spy on his employees.
programme.title: The Errand Boy

programme.desc: Controversial British officer T.E. Lawrence (Peter O'Toole) learns the culture of Arabs (Alec Guinness, Anthony Quinn) and unites their tribes against the Turks.
programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia

programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahuna (Cliff Robertson).
programme.title: Gidget

programme.desc: A detective (Peter O'Toole) helps a French art forger's daughter (Audrey Hepburn) steal a fake Venus.
programme.title: How to Steal a Million

programme.desc: Sailor Sinbad (John Phillip Law) fights a one-eyed centaur, a ship's figurehead and other creatures sent by an evil prince (Tom Baker).
programme.title: The Golden Voyage of Sinbad

programme.desc: A cartoonist (Dean Martin) turns his babbling roommate's (Jerry Lewis) bizarre dreams into a hit comic strip read by spies.
programme.title: Artists and Models

programme.desc: A corporate climber (Jack Lemmon), whose boss (Fred MacMurray) and others use his apartment for hanky-panky, aids a young woman (Shirley MacLaine).
programme.title: The Apartment

programme.desc: A heroin addict is caught between two Times Square narcotics agents and the pusher they are trying to bust.
programme.title: Born to Win

programme.desc: The queen of Egypt (Elizabeth Taylor) seduces Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison), but when he is killed, she uses Mark Antony (Richard Burton) as her new protector.
programme.title: Cleopatra

programme.desc: Runyonesque Dave the Dude (Glenn Ford) turns Apple Annie (Bette Davis) into a Manhattan dowager in director Frank Capra's remake of his 1933 Lady for a Day.
programme.title: Pocketful of Miracles

programme.desc: An outlaw is left by his cohorts and girlfriend to be captured after he is wounded during a heist. When he is released from prison, he tracks his old crew to a run-down town and plays a game of cat and mouse with them.
programme.title: Gun the Man Down

programme.desc: Poor sharecroppers, the Joads leave dust bowl Oklahoma in hope of better luck in California.
programme.title: The Grapes of Wrath

programme.desc: A mad professor (Boris Karloff) in New England zaps people in a special cabinet to create an army of supermen.
programme.title: The Boogie Man Will Get You

programme.desc: Sam Craig, a New York sportswriter marries Tess Harding, a political columnist whose career comes first.
programme.title: Woman of the Year

programme.desc: A New York dancer (Fred Astaire) grooms a chorus girl (Judy Garland) to be his new partner, falling in love along the way.
programme.title: Easter Parade

programme.desc: A secret agent (Dean Martin) stops a Chinese villain's atomic plot in the first of four Matt Helm movies.
programme.title: The Silencers

S02 E05 — Rolling Into Trouble Troopers box in a wanted suspect; but he's not done running yet.
programme.title: Police Pursuits by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E09 — Motorcyclist Will Run A motorcyclist with plates that read Will Run runs from police.
programme.title: Police Pursuits by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S06 E01 — Beach Party Meltdowns Spring break chaos erupted on Florida beaches as police tackled riots, fights, and underage drinking.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S02 E18 — Spoiled Teens Just because some people are young, doesn't mean they're above the law.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S04 E04 — Disturbing Fantasy A 21-year-old's disturbing fantasy was caught on camera.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E14 — Triple Murder Mystery A pregnant woman and her elderly father go missing; the father-to-be's lies catch up with him.
programme.title: Interrogations by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E08 — Freezer Mom A mother is in trouble when a furniture removal crew makes a horrific discovery in her freezer.
programme.title: Interrogations by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E06 — In Her Own Home A woman is shot dead by an intruder, but her husband falls under suspicion.
programme.title: Law&Crime Investigates

programme.desc: S01 E02 — Cartel Catfish A woman fed up with her boyfriend's affairs catfishes him into killing his mistress' entire family.
programme.title: Law&Crime Investigates

programme.desc: S03 E05 — Waffle Drinker A combative woman has to be restrained; a drunk is brought in for not paying the subway toll; a man is arrested for domestic violence.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S03 E06 — Jog Your Memory A man is brought in for starting fights; a woman is arrested for hitting a child; a man doesn't understand why he's being arrested.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S03 E07 — Homeless Hospitality A man is arrested for the harassment of homeless people; another man is arrested for threatening a bouncer.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S03 E08 — Teary Eyed Tagger A man is booked for a DUI but says he wasn't drinking; a gang member is busted for graffiti.
programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: S01 E54 — Skater Hater Police pursue a suspect on foot who may be armed; officers question a woman for alleged child abuse; an intoxicated man; a woman claims she was robbed at knife point.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E55 — Twofer Deal Two men fight and one assaults an officer; a man who allegedly hit a pregnant woman is questioned; a minor car accident occurs; a driver with a suspended license is arrested.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E56 — What's in Your Cup? A high speed pursuit comes to a halt with the help of a spike strip; officers make a sizable crack seizure; an identity thief is brought to justice; officers go to the scene of a DUI car accident.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E57 — Taking the Bait An attempted pull over turns into a high-speed chase; a report of two women horsing around is investigated; an intercepted drug deal turns up a wealth of evidence; a known drug runner fails to evade.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S02 E18 — Hangry Woman Police arrests a woman for alleged assault; she reportedly bites, kicks and spits at officers.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S03 E13 — Horrifying Discovery The police makes a horrifying discovery in a makeshift fire pit.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E02 — Driving Crazy Officers pull over a woman after multiple callers reported her erratic driving.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S04 E01 — Influencer Trouble Influencers find out that no amount of social media clout can get one out of trouble.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E20 — Employees Busted Employees break the law at work and get arrested.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S05 E10 — Fakers Suspects try to impersonate officers, fake their identities, and lie to law enforcement.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S03 E17 — Dumb Shoplifters Dumb shoplifters try to outsmart the police.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E58 — Bro Down Throw Down Police respond to an emotional distress call; a fight between brothers is investigated; a car is pulled over for speeding and a gun is found in the vehicle; an informant provides an actionable tip.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

Rodney and his wife Adonica pastor a church in Tampa, Florida, The River at Tampa Bay, which they founded in 1996 and which now has 3000 members.
